installCommand: dnf install -y pngquant && python3 -m venv .vercel-venv && . .vercel-venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install --disable-pip-version-check -r requirements.txt
buildCommand: . .vercel-venv/bin/activate && ENABLE_GIT_PLUGINS=true DOCS_EXTERNAL_IMAGE_PIPELINE=true DOCS_EXTERNAL_IMAGE_OPTIMIZE=true python -m mkdocs build --strict
